describes: Each line is one time-of-arrival.  Column 1 is the archive used; col 2 is observing frequency in MHz; col 3 the modified Julian date; col 4 the formal uncertainty in µs; col 5 the observatory code; trailing -<flag> <value> pairs are pipeline metadata (band, frontend, group, etc).

spans.label: tempo2 -flag value pairs (band, frontend, group, etc)
